prompt: I need an infographic for my sales team showing our Q4 funnel: we started with 1,000 leads, 250 were qualified, we sent 50 proposals, and closed 15 deals. Corporate blue and white style. It's going in a PowerPoint deck.

assertions.name: prompt_json_is_valid
assertions.description: prompt.json exists and is parseable JSON

assertions.name: all_funnel_numbers_exact
assertions.description: Prompt contains all 4 exact values: 1000, 250, 50, and 15

assertions.name: corporate_blue_white_palette
assertions.description: Prompt references blue and white colors with hex codes

assertions.name: negative_blocklist_present
assertions.description: Prompt contains negative terms like 'blurry text' or 'garbled typography'
